title: Cystic Fibrosis and Bronchitis: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Relief
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures are a natural remedy that may help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. This herbal extract contains properties like alkylamides, caffeic acid, and rosmarinic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These constituents help reduce inflammation in the airways, making it easier to breathe and alleviating congestion. They also have immunomodulatory effects, which support the body's natural defense against infections. If you're considering using...
